degraded.what: OneDrive uv hardlink-failure on worktree venv creation
degraded.note: Fresh worktree's `uv sync` failed on certifi hardlink (os error 396). Permanent fix per conventions.md learning: UV_LINK_MODE=copy. Captured as recovery pattern: `rm .venv && UV_LINK_MODE=copy uv sync --directory <worktree>`. No impact on test correctness; reproducible on every fresh worktree on OneDrive-synced Windows hosts.
